briefs.title: BC Insurance Licensing Exemptions Overhauled — Key Changes Take Effect January 1, 2027
briefs.summary: BC has amended five insurance regulations under the Financial Institutions Act, removing several licensing exemptions (including for credit, travel, and funeral services insurance) and restructuring exemptions around restricted insurance agent licences, effective January 1, 2027.
briefs.action_required: Review your insurance licensing status and exemptions before January 1, 2027 to ensure compliance with the new rules.

key_dates.label: BC insurance licensing exemption amendments take effect — Financial Institutions Act
